+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "jaeger-3571-elasticsearch-8-x-support",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "jaeger: Elasticsearch 8.x support",
+    "description": "Elasticsearch 8.x support. Requested by 28+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current jaeger deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your jaeger version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n jaeger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nhelm list -n jaeger 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working jaeger installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review jaeger configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant jaeger configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n jaeger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get configmap -n jaeger -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=jaeger\n```\n## Requirement - what kind of business use case are you trying to solve?\n\nElastic recently released Elasticsearch 8.0, by now they've released 8.1."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Elasticsearch 8.x support",
+        "description": "## Which problem is this PR solving?\n- Resolves  #3571\n\n## Short description of the changes\n- Modifies the index mapping to use the ES 7 mappings for higher versions too.\n- Modifies the tests to include ES 8\n- Modifies the github ci pipeline to add ES 8.1.0\n```yaml\nThe https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/elasticsearch/reference/8.1/migrating-8.0.html lists now (somewhere in the middle)\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade jaeger to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade jaeger:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade jaeger jaeger/jaeger --namespace jaeger\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n jaeger\nhelm list -n jaeger\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n jaeger -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get events -n jaeger --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Elasticsearch 8.x support\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Which problem is this PR solving?\n- Resolves  #3571\n\n## Short description of the changes\n- Modifies the index mapping to use the ES 7 mappings for higher versions too.\n- Modifies the tests to include ES 8\n- Modifies the github ci pipeline to add ES 8.1.0",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "The https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/elasticsearch/reference/8.1/migrating-8.0.html lists now (somewhere in the middle)",
+        "Solution: quote the false",
+        "Which becomes:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
